Text.Value: Channel diagnostics
Safety Channel diagnostics
/ Diagnostics Information:
Help Information:
Check the PROFINET and Device Configuration.
0 (No Error)
Error ID:
Adjust safety dest. address in PLC engineering tool and safety dest. address in device
Set the safety dest. address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the safety source address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the F_WD_Time to a valid value within range
Adjust safety dest. address in PLC engineering tool and safety dest. address in device
Set the safety dest. address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the safety source address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the F_WD_Time to a valid value within range
Adjust safety dest. address in PLC engineering tool and safety dest. address in device
Set the safety dest. address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the safety source address to a valid value in the PLC engineering tool
Set the F_WD_Time to a valid value within range
Adjust the configured SIL level in the engineering tool according the technical specification of the device
Check the safety settings in the PLC engineering tool
Set the safety parameter revision to an acceptable value
1. Check the safety parameter settings in the PLC 2. Check the device description file GSD
Adjust the configured SIL level in the engineering tool according the technical specification of the device
Check the safety settings in the PLC engineering tool
Set the safety parameter revision to an acceptable value
1. Check the safety parameter settings in the PLC 2. Check the device description file GSD

Check the safety settings in the PLC engineering tool

Try to fix the fault exchanging this particular device
Try to fix the fault exchanging this particular device

The PLC sets the wrong block ID. 1. Check the block ID in the PLC setup. 2. Check the device description file
Check the communication and the plant construction
1. Check safety program runtime/cycle time. 2. Increase the F_WD_Time timeout setting.
The PLC sets the wrong block ID. 1. Check the block ID in the PLC setup. 2. Check the device description file
Check the communication and the plant construction
1. Check safety program runtime/cycle time. 2. Increase the F_WD_Time timeout setting.
The PLC sets the wrong block ID. 1. Check the block ID in the PLC setup. 2. Check the device description file

1. Check safety program runtime/cycle time. 2. Increase the F_WD_Time timeout setting.

F_Dest_Add = 0 or FFFFhex
F_Source_Add = 0 or FFFFhex

PROFIsafe CRC2 error
F_WD_Time or F_WD_Time_2 timeout
Reserved (PROFIsafe standard)
